prompt: Review the docs/prompt-caching.md file for factual inaccuracies, unverified claims, and logical flaws. Use an adversarial approach - question everything that isn't rigorously proven. Focus on: 1) The 5-minute cache TTL claim being unverified, 2) Whether hook-based keepalive actually affects API cache, 3) Outdated pricing information, 4) Any HIPAA or compliance claims. Output a structured report with specific citations from the document.

assertions.name: questions_cache_ttl_claim
assertions.description: Questions the unverified 5-minute cache TTL claim

assertions.name: identifies_cache_logic_flaw
assertions.description: Identifies that hook output doesn't affect API-level cache

assertions.name: provides_specific_citations
assertions.description: Findings include specific citations with line/section references

assertions.name: challenges_hipaa_claims
assertions.description: Flags HIPAA claims as potentially inaccurate/liability risk
